title: beta vulgaris subsp. perennis
intro: Beta vulgaris subsp. perennis, also known as the sea beet or wild beet, is a wild subspecies of the beet plant native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Beta vulgaris subsp. perennis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
